title: lippia cayensis
intro: Lippia cayensis, also known as Cayensis lippia or Cayennese lippia, is a type of flowering plant in the verbena family (Verbenaceae). It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lippia cayensis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Lippia cayensis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and respiratory infections.
